rows.USen: What's wrong?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>哎呀……那时候真是多亏了你啊……<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>You're the guy who saved us after that

Whew... <unk[5:0]>Talk about a bad meal.
<unk[3:0:263]>Say... <unk[5:0]>Being as you're such a helpful sort,
maybe you can help me out of the bind
I'm in now.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>咕咕鸡……这里的咕咕鸡
<unk[5:0]>就只剩1只了，其他的都跑掉了……
我本来只是想看看有没有鸡蛋掉在地上，
就稍微靠近了一点……
<unk[3:0:259]>这……这下完蛋了啊……
我绝对会挨骂的……
<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>虽然我觉得它们应该还<Color=red>没有跑太远<Color=white>……<unk[5:0]>

除了这里的应该还有<Color=red>5只<Color=white>，<unk[5:0]>
不过我只要一靠近，它们就要逃……
趁驿站的人还没发现，
得快点想办法把咕咕鸡们<Color=red>抓回栅栏里<Color=white>才行……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>咕咕雞……<unk[5:0]>除了這1隻之外，
這裡的咕咕雞都逃走了，
本來只是想確認有沒有蛋，
所以稍微接近牠們……
<unk[3:0:259]>這下子……可糟糕了……
我闖下了大禍……
<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>我想牠們應該<Color=red>沒有跑太遠<Color=white>……<unk[5:0]>

不過我一靠近牠們大概又會逃走……
我得在惹驛站的人生氣前，
把所有咕咕雞<Color=red>抓回柵欄裡才行<Color=white>……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>コッコが… ここにいたコッコが<unk[5:0]>
1<Ruby={2:2}わ>羽を<Ruby={2:4}のこ>残して みんな<Ruby={2:2}に>逃げちゃったんだ…
タマゴが<Ruby={2:2}お>落ちてないかと<Ruby={2:4}おも>思って
ちょっと<Ruby={2:4}ちか>近づいただけなんだけど…
<unk[3:0:259]>これ… やばいよな…
<Ruby={6:12}ぜったいおこ>絶対怒られるヤツだよな…

<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿の<Ruby={2:4}ひと>人に<Ruby={2:4}おこ>怒られる<Ruby={2:4}まえ>前に コッコたちを
<Ruby={2:4}なん>何とかして<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}さく>柵の<Ruby={2:4}なか>中に<Ruby={2:4}もど>戻さないと<Color=white>…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>There used to be six Cuccos here, see.
And I was hungry, and I figured where
there are Cuccos, there are eggs.
But when I got close...<unk[5:1]>all except one flew
away! Now it looks like I stole them!

<unk[3:0:259]>Do you know what happens to Cucco
thieves around here? <unk[5:0]>Well, neither do I.
But probably nothing good!
<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>I know what you're thinking. "How far
could they get with those little wings?
They must be <Color=red>nearby<Color=white>!"<unk[5:0]>
And you'd be right about that. <unk[5:0]>But as
soon as I get close, they'll scram!

I really need to get the other <Color=red>five <Color=white>Cuccos
<Color=red>back inside the fence <Color=white>before someone
from the stable finds out...

rows.JPja: そっとしておく
rows.USen: I'll...leave you to it.

<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:16 83 99 97 114 101 95 48 49]>They can't have gone far, right?
But where are they?!

that's flown the coop is useless.
